channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Two sofas on pavement since 05 May, 25th May
item.description:
Two grey sofas from 314 maurer court were left on the pavement for 20 days
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mudlarks Boulevard, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 25th May
item.description:
There is a deceased animal in the road (appears to be a fox).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingswood Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ongoing Fly-tipping, 25th May
item.description:
Hi there, Please keep a close eye on the bottom of the Victoria Way as this stop is constantly used as a fly-tipping area. Kindly remove this asap and perhaps install a sign that fly-tipping is a crime or add CCTV in the area. Best, L

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Way, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead dog, 25th May
item.description:
Dead dog between jct 6 and 7 on the fast lane saw it at 2.45pm
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M11, Epping, Epping Forest
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Just before Nightingale Road. Photos taken 24th May 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Herbert Road, Woolwich

item.title: Rubbish dumped outside 63 Ripon Road on public pavement, 25th May
item.description:
63 Ripon Road can’t use their bin properly and have dumped rubbish on the public pavement. Photos taken 25th May 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ripon Road, Plumstead

item.title: Has been abandoned for months, 25th May

Car has been left there for months and no sign of the owner -

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Broad Walk, Kidbrooke

item.title: Hazardous asbestos on the public footpath near Meridian Pavilion, 25th May
item.description:
Photos taken 25th May 2026. There’s also a large rusty metal pole left a few feet away from the asbestos as well.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Park Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working near 3 Petworth Road, 25th May
item.description:
There seems to be an issue with the street light and it’s dark. This may cause harm to pedestrians as this is used quite often by children and elderly people.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Petworth Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spring channel flowing over footpath slippery, 25th May
item.description:
Seems the natural Spring have been channelled to flow over footpath, it’s causing a very slippery wide puddle which is dangerous to cross especially for elderly people and children.Pleeas address asap by putting a pipe either under the pavement or making a drain in pathway so water doesn’t overflow all over 5-6 feet width and cause puddle on path. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glebe Knoll, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping and misuse of bins, 25th May
item.description:
Every week the bins are being misused. There’s rubbish everywhere, all flowing out the communal bin area to the point you can’t even get in to dispose anymore. It’s causing a serious infestation.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Monteagle Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: O/s 109 Brondesbury villas, 25th May
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load
